score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 回升中

summary.en: USD liquidity remains in tightening mode but the inflection point is approaching. TGA growth slowed dramatically from +$227B to +$82.7B — the seasonal peak is almost certainly in. The Fed repo lending facility collapsed from $10.5B to $4M, confirming the acute funding stress has resolved. The DOJ dropping the Powell investigation removes the political risk premium that was driving the most aggressive risk-off. The structural headwind ($388B three-week drain) has not reversed, but the path to mid-May TGA unwind is now clearer. Net liquidity at $5.700T needs to recover toward $5.9T+ before adding aggressively.
summary.zh: 美元流动性仍处于紧缩模式，但拐点正在临近。TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降至 +827 亿美元——季节性顶部几乎可以确认。美联储 repo 借贷工具从 105 亿美元崩溃至 400 万美元，确认急性融资压力已解除。DOJ 撤销 Powell 调查消除了驱动最激进风险规避的政治风险溢价。结构性逆风（三周 3880 亿美元抽水）尚未逆转，但 5 月中旬 TGA 回落的路径现在更清晰。净流动性 5.700 万亿美元需要回升至 5.9 万亿美元以上才能积极加仓。

fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平

rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate slowed sharply from +$227B; peak signal confirmed
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降；见顶信号明确

net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——抽水减速

details.en: Two key positive developments today: (1) TGA growth decelerated sharply — from +$227B to +$82.7B — confirming the tax-season surge is ending. The TGA should peak within 1-2 weeks and begin the seasonal unwind, adding $200-300B back to net liquidity by mid-May. (2) DOJ dropped the investigation into firing Powell — the political risk premium that was driving the most aggressive risk-off is removed. Bank reserves at $2.915T remain below $3T threshold, but repo lending at $4M confirms no acute stress. The structural tightening continues but the catalyst for the next leg of improvement is in sight.
details.zh: 今天两个关键正面进展：（1）TGA 增速骤降——从 +2270 亿美元降至 +827 亿美元——确认税季冲击正在结束。TGA 应在 1-2 周内见顶并开始季节性回落，在 5 月中旬前向净流动性补充 2000-3000 亿美元。（2）DOJ 撤销解雇 Powell 的调查——驱动最激进风险规避的政治风险溢价消除。银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元仍低于 3 万亿美元门槛，但 repo 借贷 400 万美元确认无急性压力。结构性紧缩持续，但下一轮改善的催化剂已在视野之内。

status.zh: 紧缩但减速——政治风险消除

reason.en: Score improved from 40 to 45. Two positive catalysts: TGA growth decelerated sharply (+$82.7B vs +$227B last week) and DOJ dropped the Powell investigation. The acute phase of the tax-season drain is ending. Repo lending at $4M confirms no funding stress. The structural $388B three-week drain remains, but the inflection point (TGA peak + unwind) is now 1-2 weeks away. Score at 45 reflects the improving trajectory — not yet 50 because the drain hasn't reversed, only slowed.
reason.zh: 分数从 40 升至 45。两个正面催化剂：TGA 增速骤降（+827 亿美元 vs 上周 +2270 亿美元），DOJ 撤销 Powell 调查。税季抽水的急性阶段正在结束。Repo 借贷 400 万美元确认无融资压力。结构性 3880 亿美元三周抽水仍在，但拐点（TGA 见顶 + 回落）现在距离 1-2 周。分数 45 反映改善轨迹——尚未达到 50，因为抽水尚未逆转，只是减速。

status.zh: 改善——半导体验证 AI 需求

reason.en: Score improved from 52 to 62. Intel +23.65% on massive earnings beat — data center revenue up 24%, AI accelerator demand confirmed. AMD +13.91% confirmed the AI hardware cycle. NVIDIA +4.33% in sympathy. Overall beat rate 83% with average beat magnitude +13%. The Intel/AMD results directly counter the IBM/ServiceNow software misses from yesterday — the AI spending is real, it's just flowing to hardware not software. Beat-and-drop continues outside semis (Comcast -12.90%), but the AI hardware validation is a significant positive. Score at 62 — not higher because beat-and-drop persists and Mag 5 next week is the real test.
reason.zh: 分数从 52 升至 62。Intel +23.65%，大幅超预期——数据中心营收 +24%，AI 加速器需求确认。AMD +13.91% 确认 AI 硬件周期。NVIDIA +4.33% 同情上涨。整体超预期率 83%，平均超幅 +13%。Intel/AMD 结果直接反驳昨天 IBM/ServiceNow 软件 miss——AI 支出是真实的，只是流向硬件而非软件。非半导体领域 beat and drop 持续（Comcast -12.90%），但 AI 硬件验证是重大正面信号。分数 62——未更高，因为 beat and drop 持续，下周 Mag 5 才是真正的测试。

reason.en: Score improved marginally from 38 to 48, but the breadth picture is deeply concerning. S&P and Nasdaq made all-time highs, but only ~57% of stocks are above their 200DMA. Financials: only 48.68% above 200DMA. Dow Jones -0.16% — did not confirm the S&P/Nasdaq new highs. VIX at 18.71 with S&P at all-time highs is a significant divergence — institutions are buying insurance at the top. The day's rally was driven almost entirely by Intel (+23.65%), AMD (+13.91%), NVIDIA (+4.33%) — three stocks pulling Nasdaq higher while Dow declined. This is extreme concentration, not broad-based strength.
reason.zh: 分数从 38 小幅升至 48，但广度状况深令人担忧。S&P 和 Nasdaq 创历史新高，但仅约 57% 的股票在 200 日均线上方。金融板块：仅 48.68% 在 200 日均线上方。道琼斯 -0.16%——没有确认 S&P/Nasdaq 新高。VIX 18.71 与 S&P 历史新高背离——机构在顶部买保险。当天的反弹几乎完全由 Intel（+23.65%）、AMD（+13.91%）、NVIDIA（+4.33%）驱动——三只股票拉动 Nasdaq 走高，而道指下跌。这是极端集中度，不是广泛的强势。

status.en: Improving — Dual New Highs, But Divergences Persist
status.zh: 改善——双创新高，但背离持续

reason.en: Score improved from 42 to 60. S&P 500 at 7,165.08 (+0.80%) and Nasdaq at 24,836.60 (+1.63%) both made all-time highs. VIX declined to 18.71 (-3.11%). The yield spike reversed: 10Y at 4.310% (down from 4.323%). WTI oil retreated to $94.88 (-1.01%), Brent retreated from $106 to $99.78. These are genuine positive price signals. Score at 60 — not higher because VIX at 18.71 is elevated for an all-time high, Dow didn't confirm, and the concentration is extreme. The divergences are real warnings even as the headline numbers look strong.
reason.zh: 分数从 42 升至 60。S&P 500 7,165.08（+0.80%）和 Nasdaq 24,836.60（+1.63%）双创历史新高。VIX 降至 18.71（-3.11%）。收益率反转：10Y 4.310%（从 4.323% 下降）。WTI 油价回落至 $94.88（-1.01%），Brent 从 $106 回落至 $99.78。这些是真实的正面价格信号。分数 60——未更高，因为 VIX 18.71 在历史新高时偏高，道指未确认，集中度极端。即使标题数字看起来强劲，背离也是真实的警告。

trading_summary.en:
52.4 — Moderate. From panic to cautious optimism in one day. Intel +24% changed the narrative — AI hardware demand is real. S&P/Nasdaq dual new highs. DOJ dropped Powell probe, political risk removed. VIX declining, yield spike reversing, oil retreating.

But breadth at 57% insufficient, VIX divergence (18.71 at all-time high), extreme concentration (Intel/AMD/NVIDIA driving Nasdaq while Dow falls), beat-and-drop continues outside semis. Standard position 52%.

Next week Mag 5 earnings (Apple, Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft, Meta) are 2026's watershed moment — 25% of S&P weight reporting. Collective beat → score rises to 60+. Miss → back to 40s. Wait for the answer.
trading_summary.zh:
52.4 分，Moderate。一天之内从恐慌到谨慎乐观。Intel +24% 改变叙事——AI 硬件需求是真的。S&P/Nasdaq 双创新高。DOJ 撤销 Powell 调查解除政治风险。VIX 下降，yield 反转，油价回落。

但广度 57% 不够，VIX 背离（历史新高时 18.71），集中度极端（Intel/AMD/NVIDIA 拉动 Nasdaq 而道指下跌），非半导体领域 beat and drop 持续。标准仓位 52%。

下周 Mag 5 财报（Apple、Amazon、Alphabet、Microsoft、Meta）是 2026 年分水岭——S&P 25% 权重集中报告。集体 beat → 确信度升至 60+。miss → 回到 40s。等答案。

trading_quote: The market gives you information every day. Today it said: AI hardware is real. Next week it will say: is the rest of the economy real too?

note.en: All-time high — semi-driven rally, not broad-based
note.zh: 历史新高——半导体驱动，非广泛上涨

note.en: All-time high — Intel +24%, AMD +14%, NVIDIA +4% drove the index
note.zh: 历史新高——Intel +24%、AMD +14%、NVIDIA +4% 拉动指数

note.en: Did NOT confirm S&P/Nasdaq new highs — divergence warning
note.zh: 未确认 S&P/Nasdaq 新高——背离警告

note.en: Small caps modestly higher — not leading the rally
note.zh: 小盘股小幅走高——未领涨

note.en: Yield spike reversing — positive for equities
note.zh: 收益率反转下行——对股市正面

note.en: Long end still elevated — inflation premium persists
note.zh: 长端仍高位——通胀溢价持续

note.en: Dollar easing — DOJ/Powell political risk removed
note.zh: 美元走软——DOJ/Powell 政治风险消除

note.en: Near flat — consolidating near highs, structural bull intact
note.zh: 接近持平——在高位整理，结构性看涨逻辑完整

note.en: Oil retreating from $96.85 — Hormuz risk premium easing slightly
note.zh: 油价从 $96.85 回落——Hormuz 风险溢价略微缓解

note.en: Brent retreated from $106 — still elevated near $100
note.zh: Brent 从 $106 回落——仍在 $100 附近高位

note.en: BTC declined — risk-off in crypto despite equity rally
note.zh: BTC 下跌——尽管股市上涨，加密货币风险规避

note.en: Declining but elevated — 18.71 at all-time high is a divergence
note.zh: 下降但仍偏高——历史新高时 18.71 是背离信号

exchange_flow_detail.en: 52-week range: $60,074 – $126,198 | Declined despite equity rally — crypto risk-off
exchange_flow_detail.zh: 52 周区间：$60,074 – $126,198 | 股市上涨但 BTC 下跌——加密货币风险规避

analysis.en: BTC -1.23% to $77,478 despite S&P/Nasdaq making all-time highs — a notable divergence. ETH -0.77%. The crypto market is not participating in the equity rally driven by Intel/AMD/NVIDIA. This suggests the crypto market is pricing in different risks (perhaps the Hormuz oil shock or the concentration of the equity rally). BTC holding above $75,000 support is the key level. If equities continue higher next week on Mag 5 earnings, BTC should follow. If Mag 5 disappoints, BTC could test $70,000.
analysis.zh: 尽管 S&P/Nasdaq 创历史新高，BTC -1.23% 至 $77,478——显著背离。ETH -0.77%。加密货币市场没有参与 Intel/AMD/NVIDIA 驱动的股市反弹。这表明加密货币市场在定价不同的风险（可能是 Hormuz 石油冲击或股市反弹的集中度）。BTC 守住 $75,000 支撑位是关键水平。如果股市下周在 Mag 5 财报后继续走高，BTC 应该跟随。如果 Mag 5 令人失望，BTC 可能测试 $70,000。

gold_silver_note.en: Near flat — consolidating near all-time highs
gold_silver_note.zh: 接近持平——在历史高位附近整理

key_driver.en: Geopolitical Risk + Central Bank Buying + Dollar Credibility
key_driver.zh: 地缘政治风险 + 央行购金 + 美元信誉

key_driver_detail.en: Hormuz mining order still in background + central bank buying + long-term dollar credibility concerns
key_driver_detail.zh: Hormuz 布雷令仍在背景中 + 央行购金 + 长期美元信誉担忧

analysis.en: Gold +0.03% to $4,725.40 — essentially flat, consolidating near all-time highs. The structural bull case remains fully intact: central bank buying, geopolitical risk (Hormuz), and long-term dollar credibility concerns. The slight pullback from $4,849 highs is healthy consolidation. Gold is not selling off despite the equity rally and VIX decline — this is bullish. The gold-silver ratio at 88.5 suggests silver is relatively cheap. Key support: $4,600. The structural bull case remains the dominant narrative.
analysis.zh: 黄金 +0.03% 至 $4,725.40——基本持平，在历史高位附近整理。结构性看涨逻辑完全完整：央行购金、地缘政治风险（Hormuz）和长期美元信誉担忧。从 $4,849 高点的小幅回调是健康整理。尽管股市上涨和 VIX 下降，黄金没有下跌——这是看涨信号。金银比 88.5 表明白银相对便宜。关键支撑：$4,600。结构性看涨逻辑仍是主导叙事。

title.en: Mag 5 Earnings Next Week — 2026 Watershed Moment
title.zh: 下周 Mag 5 财报——2026 年分水岭

description.en: Apple, Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Meta report next week — collectively representing approximately 25% of S&P 500 market cap. Reuters calls it a 'pivotal week.' The binary outcome: collective beat → composite score rises to 60+, position increases to 60-65%. Miss → back to 40s, reduce to 40%. Intel and AMD validated AI hardware demand, but software misses (IBM, ServiceNow) suggest enterprise spending may be bifurcating. The question is whether the Mag 5 confirm the AI hardware narrative or reveal broader demand weakness. This is the most important single week for the market in 2026.
description.zh: Apple、Amazon、Alphabet、Microsoft 和 Meta 下周报告——合计约占 S&P 500 市值的 25%。Reuters 称之为「关键一周」。二元结果：集体 beat → 综合确信度升至 60+，仓位增至 60-65%。miss → 回到 40s，减至 40%。Intel 和 AMD 验证了 AI 硬件需求，但软件 miss（IBM、ServiceNow）表明企业支出可能在分化。问题是 Mag 5 是否确认 AI 硬件叙事，或揭示更广泛的需求疲软。这是 2026 年市场最重要的单周。

title.en: Breadth + VIX Divergence — Institutions Buying Insurance at the Top
title.zh: 广度 + VIX 背离——机构在顶部买保险

description.en: S&P and Nasdaq at all-time highs, but: (1) Only ~57% of stocks above 200DMA — not broad-based. (2) Financials: only 48.68% above 200DMA — the sector that should lead in a healthy bull is lagging. (3) Dow Jones -0.16% — did not confirm new highs. (4) VIX at 18.71 with S&P at all-time high — historically, VIX below 15 at new highs is healthy; 18.71 means institutions are paying elevated premiums for downside protection. The concentration is extreme: Intel/AMD/NVIDIA drove the Nasdaq while the Dow fell. This is not a healthy broad-based rally.
description.zh: S&P 和 Nasdaq 创历史新高，但：（1）仅约 57% 的股票在 200 日均线上方——非广泛上涨。（2）金融板块：仅 48.68% 在 200 日均线上方——在健康牛市中应该领涨的板块在落后。（3）道琼斯 -0.16%——未确认新高。（4）VIX 18.71 与 S&P 历史新高背离——历史上，新高时 VIX 低于 15 是健康的；18.71 意味着机构在为下行保护支付高溢价。集中度极端：Intel/AMD/NVIDIA 拉动 Nasdaq 而道指下跌。这不是健康的广泛上涨。

title.en: Liquidity Still Tightening — $388B Three-Week Drain Unresolved
title.zh: 流动性仍紧缩——3880 亿美元三周抽水未解决

description.en: Net liquidity at $5.700T — $388B below three weeks ago. TGA at $1.007T, bank reserves at $2.915T (below $3T threshold). Oil at $94.88 (WTI) / $99.78 (Brent) — still elevated, maintaining inflation pressure and limiting Fed's rate cut window. The Hormuz mining order is still in the background. The structural tightening has not reversed — only decelerated. The mid-May TGA unwind is the catalyst to watch. Until net liquidity recovers toward $5.9T+, the structural headwind remains.
description.zh: 净流动性 5.700 万亿美元——比三周前低 3880 亿美元。TGA 1.007 万亿美元，银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元（低于 3 万亿美元门槛）。油价 $94.88（WTI）/ $99.78（Brent）——仍高位，维持通胀压力并限制美联储降息窗口。Hormuz 布雷令仍在背景中。结构性紧缩尚未逆转——只是减速。5 月中旬 TGA 回落是要关注的催化剂。在净流动性回升至 5.9 万亿美元以上之前，结构性逆风持续。

description.en: Four active divergences: (1) S&P/Nasdaq all-time highs but Dow -0.16% — non-confirmation. (2) VIX 18.71 at S&P all-time high — institutions buying insurance at the top. (3) Breadth ~57% at index new highs — not broad-based. (4) BTC -1.23% while S&P +0.80% — crypto not participating in equity rally. The semiconductor concentration (Intel/AMD/NVIDIA driving Nasdaq while Dow falls) is the most extreme single-day concentration signal in this series. The divergences are real warnings even as headline numbers look strong.
description.zh: 四重活跃背离：（1）S&P/Nasdaq 历史新高但道指 -0.16%——不确认。（2）VIX 18.71 与 S&P 历史新高背离——机构在顶部买保险。（3）广度约 57% 在指数新高时——非广泛上涨。（4）BTC -1.23% 而 S&P +0.80%——加密货币不参与股市反弹。半导体集中度（Intel/AMD/NVIDIA 拉动 Nasdaq 而道指下跌）是本系列中最极端的单日集中度信号。即使标题数字看起来强劲，背离也是真实的警告。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, DJI, BTC, Gold, VIX

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
